title: Pentagon releases third batch of declassified UFO documents online
Pentagon releases third batch of declassified UFO documents online
description: The U.S. Department of Defense has officially released its third batch of declassified records concerning Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAPs), commonly referred to as UFOs, publishing the newly available data directly to its official website, AzerNEWS reports.

title: Neymer Among 700 People to Be Abducted by UFO, Psychic Vo Bahiana Makes Bizarre Prediction for Brazil vs Scotland World Cup 2026 Match (Watch Video)
description: A Brazilian psychic with millions of followers, Vo Bahiana, has issued a viral warning predicting a UFO mothership will appear at the FIFA World Cup 2026 match between Brazil and Scotland in Miami on June 24, 2026. The startling claim suggests the craft will abduct 700 individuals, including players like Neymar.

title: FILE - A woman looks at a UFO display outside of the Little A'Le'Inn, in Rachel, Nev., the closest town to Area 51, July 22, 2019.
description: The 72 files released don’t include kind of blockbuster revelation that Trump has teased and there’s no conclusive evidence of alien life or government cover-ups.

title: Alien Mystery? US Report Mentions Mysterious UFO Sightings Over India In 1968
description: A US report based on newly declassified documents reveals multiple unidentified aerial sightings over Indias Himalayan regions and Nepal in 1968 These UAP incidents involved fast-moving objects bright lights and loud sounds though US officials caution against definitive conclusions
